CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(OR(BEGINS(Asset.CodeNature__c, 'G'), BEGINS(Asset.CodeNature__c, 'F'), BEGINS(Asset.CodeNature__c, 'C'), BEGINS(Asset.CodeNature__c, 'M'))), 'grey', IF(OR(YEAR(Asset.InstallDate)=1900, Asset.MarqueProduit__c = "10015", Asset.MarqueProduit__c = "10235",ISBLANK(Asset.MarqueProduit__c), AND(((TODAY() - Asset.InstallDate)/ 365 ) > 25, BEGINS(Asset.CodeNature__c, 'G'))), 'orange', IF( Asset.InstallDate < Asset.Product2.Date_fin_de_risque_amiante__c, 'red', IF(Asset.InstallDate >= Asset.Product2.Date_fin_de_risque_amiante__c, 'green', null) ) ) )
CustomField.label: TECH_AssetRisqueAmiante
